subcodes.first_line: O Siyyid Muhammad! Say: My God, my God! I beseech Thee by the lights of Thy throne and the manifestations of Thy power, and by the Lamp whereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سید محمد قل الهی الهی اسئلک بانوار عرشک و ظهورات قدرتک و بالمصباح الذی به
subcodes.subjects: @Greatest Name, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
